core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss precision with Organic warmth.
Emotion First: Trust and Efficiency. The user is here to get paid.
Content is King: Data density without clutter. Every pixel must earn its rent.
Contrast: High contrast for readability in bright environments (mobile use).
anti_patterns: No gradients on text unless it's a specific 'hero' moment.
No 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit' for character.
No center-aligned dashboards. Use asymmetric grids.

typography.installation: Import via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Outfit:wght@500;600;700;800&display=swap');

usage_rules.headings: Use 'Outfit' for all h1-h6. Tracking tight (-0.02em). Weight 600 or 700.
usage_rules.body: Use 'Inter' for all paragraphs and data tables. Tracking normal.

primary.name: Burnt Orange
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, key highlights.

secondary.name: Warm Stone
secondary.usage: Sidebar backgrounds, secondary buttons, card headers.

accent.name: Deep Charcoal
accent.usage: Text, strong borders, dark mode backgrounds.

containers.dashboard_card: bg-card border border-border shadow-sm rounded-lg p-6
containers.sidebar: bg-secondary/50 border-r border-border h-screen sticky top-0

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-md transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95 rounded-md font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-input hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 rounded-md font-medium

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

tables.header: bg-muted/50 text-muted-foreground font-medium text-xs uppercase tracking-wider

login_background.alt: Abstract modern office background with orange accents
login_background.usage: Full screen background for Login/Register pages with overlay.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px for a clean, technical look.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text on orange backgrounds is white or very dark grey. Avoid orange text on white unless large.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE CSS VARIABLES: Replace the content of /app/frontend/src/index.css with the variables defined in 'colors.css_variables_update'.
2. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to the top of index.css.
3. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Ensure tailwind.config.js extends the theme correctly to use these variables.
4. USE SHADCN: Use the existing components in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/ but customize them via className props to match the 'Merchant Blaze' aesthetic.
5. LAYOUT: Implement the Dashboard using the Bento Grid strategy (Mode B).
6. AUTH PAGES: Use the 'login_background' image for the auth pages with a white/90 glassmorphism card for the form.
7. MOBILE RESPONSIVENESS: Ensure all tables have horizontal scroll on mobile and navigation collapses to a hamburger menu.
8. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to every button, input, and link.

do_not: Do not use gradients for main backgrounds.
Do not make the UI too dense on mobile.
do: Use the primary orange sparingly for high-impact actions.
Keep the UI clean and professional.
